title: Residency
description: GET /residency?path=<abs> — honest, live per-path residency. JM-2 (new endpoint). Blocks OpenLoupe's green 'resident' badge: until this exists, OpenLoupe must not claim resident.

path.description: Echo of the queried absolute path.

exists.description: Does the path exist in the JuiceMount metadata mirror.

inode.description: entries.inode (omitted when exists=false). The inode half of durable identity.

resident.description: ALL bytes are cached on SSD right now — NOT merely 'is pinned'. The only field that may light the green badge. IMPLEMENTATION RULE: JuiceMount has per-byte cache accounting ONLY for files with a pinned_files row. For any path with no pinned_files row it MUST report resident=false, streaming=true, bytes_cached=0 (honest under-claim). resident=true is emitted only when a pinned_files row shows bytes_cached>=total.

pinned.description: Is the path (or its pin_root) in pin.db.

total.description: File size in bytes (0 when exists=false).

streaming.description: exists && !resident — reachable but served block-by-block from the backend.

upload_state.description: Mirror of spool_entries.drain_state if mid-upload to the NAS, else null (or "done").

checked_at.description: Unix seconds when this was computed (freshness).
